hero.title: Same-Day Delivery
hero.subtitle: Speed When It Matters Most
hero.description: Get your packages delivered within hours. Our same-day delivery service is perfect for urgent shipments that can't wait until tomorrow.

overview.title: Why Choose Same-Day Delivery?
overview.description: When time is critical, our same-day delivery ensures your shipments arrive fast and reliably. Benefit from real-time tracking, dedicated support, and priority handling.

features.title: Ultra-Fast Shipping
features.description: Packages picked up and delivered within hours, not days.

features.title: Guaranteed Deadlines
features.description: We meet your tightest delivery windows, every time.

features.title: Local Expertise
features.description: Our local couriers know the fastest routes in your city.

features.title: Live Support
features.description: Get real-time updates and support from our team.

cta.title: Need It Delivered Today?
cta.description: Book your same-day delivery now and experience unmatched speed and reliability.
